title: ServerSignedAuth
description: Server-signed authorization delivered by the app to the station via BLE characteristic FFF3 (Write). Used when the station is offline (Partial A strategy) and the server signs the authorization for the app to relay.

signedAuthorization.description: Server-signed authorisation wrapper (data + signature + signatureAlgorithm) per profiles/offline/ble-handshake.md §4.2.1. The canonical signed body is defined by server-signed-auth-claims.schema.json (10 required claims). Station-side verification in §4.2.2.
